reference: No, it is not pregnancy. Go for a urine pregnancy test if you have any doubts. It is gastritis or, you can say, acidity. Take pantoprazole daily on an empty stomach. Avoid spicy food, tea, and coffee.
text: No it is not pregnancy. Go for a urine pregnancy test if you have any doubts. It is gastritis or you can say acidity. Take pantoprazole daily on an empty stomach. Avoid spicy food, tea and coffee.
